title: festuca costei
intro: Festuca costei, also known as Costa's fescue, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Festuca costei include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestion and soothe gastrointestinal problems.
